programs.title: Tanked
programs.desc: Wayde and Brett are asked to create two tanks for hip-hop megastar Akon's dream house - but their own dreams of musical stardom look set to derail the build.

programs.title: Wheeler Dealers
programs.desc: Mike and Ant share their favourite moments from the series, revealing the hilarious outtakes, behind-the-scenes moments and private insights.

programs.title: Texas Metal
programs.desc: It's not everyday Ekstensive Metalworks gets to customize a 2005 Ferrari F430, but the entire team must pull out all the stops to make this Italian sports car one of one.

programs.title: Shorty's Dream Shop
programs.desc: Shorty and Pete track down an extremely rare Volkswagen delivery bus for a collector who dreams of creating a VW museum.

programs.title: Wheeler Dealers World Tour
programs.desc: In their most ambitious project yet, Mike and Elvis aim to build a tribute to Paddy Hopkirk's winning 1964 Mini Cooper. Will it cross the finish line?

programs.title: Counting Cars
programs.desc: US reality series following life at Count's Kustoms, a car customisation and restoration company in Las Vegas. After months of toil - as well as a generous helping of horseplay - Roli puts the finishing touches to his electric car. How will Danny and the boys rate his efforts?
